turns.speaker: worker
turns.text: Nine-one-one, what is your emergency?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Please help! There's a strong gas smell coming from my apartment and my roommate is still inside, he won't answer!

turns.speaker: worker
turns.text: Are you outside the building right now?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yes, yes I just ran out. But Jamie is still in there, his bedroom door is closed, he might be asleep!

turns.speaker: worker
turns.text: Do not go back inside. I'm sending fire and EMS right now. What is the address?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: It's forty-four Birchwood Drive, apartment two-oh-four. Oh god, what if he can't breathe in there?

turns.speaker: worker
turns.text: Units are on the way. What's your name?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Emma. Emma Reyes. Please hurry, the smell was really strong near the kitchen.

turns.speaker: worker
turns.text: Emma, you did the right thing getting out. Is anyone else in the building you know of?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: I don't know — there's Mrs. Kim across the hall, she's older. Should I knock on doors?

turns.speaker: worker
turns.text: Do not go back inside. Move to the street, away from the building entrance. Do not use any elevators or light switches. Can you see others leaving?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: A couple people are coming out now. I can hear a hissing sound from the kitchen window up there.

turns.speaker: worker
turns.text: Stay back at least one hundred feet from the building. What floor is your apartment?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Second floor. The window above the entrance — that's our kitchen. Is it going to explode?

turns.speaker: worker
turns.text: Fire crews are very close. Keep calling Jamie's phone — vibration may wake him. What does he look like?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: He's tall, twenty-three, dark hair, usually wears a gray hoodie to sleep. Jamie! Pick up!

turns.speaker: worker
turns.text: I've relayed that description. Do you see emergency vehicles?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yes! Yes, a fire truck is turning onto the street right now. Oh thank god.

turns.speaker: worker
turns.text: Flag them down and tell them: second floor, apartment two-oh-four, possible person inside, hissing near the kitchen window.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Okay, I'm going to them now. Please make sure they find him!

turns.speaker: worker
turns.text: They will. Stay with the crews and keep your phone on. I'm here.
